layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Bento Grid (Mode A) for Services, Asymmetric overlaps for About section. Heavy use of negative space.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm for a sharp, aggressive automotive look

surfaces_and_effects.cards: bg-[#0A0A0C] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/40 transition-colors duration-500
surfaces_and_effects.texture: Subtle SVG noise overlay fixed on background to remove digital flatness

components.buttons: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm py-4 px-8
components.primary_cta: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#D4AF37] to-[#FFD700] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)] transition-all
components.inputs: bg-[#050505] border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] rounded-none h-12
components.3d_hero: React Three Fiber canvas containing a floating 3D plane or extruded shape with the Gloss Kings logo texture, slowly rotating on the Y axis, with golden point lights and environment mapping for reflections.

animation_guidelines.hero: Parallax effect on background image during scroll. 3D logo shield rotates continuously but reacts slightly to mouse movement.
animation_guidelines.scroll_reveal: Framer Motion staggered fade-up (y: 30, opacity: 0 -> 1) for text and service cards.
animation_guidelines.hover: Subtle scale up (1.02) and border color transition to gold on interactive cards.

sections: Hero: 3D Logo, 'Experience Royal Treatment', Book Now CTA
Why Gloss Kings: Process, Precision, Expertise

technical_requirements.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='quote-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use dark luxury archetype. Implement React Three Fiber for the hero section utilizing the provided logo URL as a texture on a 3D primitive (like a thin cylinder or custom shape to act as a shield/coin). Layer cinematic lighting. Keep backgrounds nearly pure black with subtle noise. Build a high-end booking form using Shadcn inputs but customized to match the dark/gold theme. Ensure 'data-testid' is used properly across CTAs and form fields.
